## Tags
chair, furniture, seat, comfort, relax

## Categories
home

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/rocking-chair)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::RockingChair;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        RockingChair { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
